title: hydrangea schizomollis
intro: Hydrangea schizomollis, also known as the smooth hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting the immune system. Hydrangea schizomollis can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
